name: Kirisame Co.
description: Providing editorial and design support for the ESAP Project through a unique visual philosophy.

content.content: Founded in 2017, Kirisame Co. pursues restrained yet expressive forms of communication through design deconstruction and visual philosophy.
Kirisame Co. provides the following support to the ESAP Project:

items: Editorial review & story feedback — proofreading and suggestions for worldbuilding narratives
UI design consultation — advocating for restrained interactions, avoiding excessive animation and visual noise
